## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (incorrect or broken documentation)
- [ ] New documentation (adding a missing doc)
- [ ] Update (keeping existing docs current)
- [ ] Restructure (moving or reorganizing content)

## Checklist

- [ ] All links work (no 404s)
- [ ] Code examples have been tested against the live platform
- [ ] CLI commands have been verified
- [ ] No proprietary information is included (internal credentials, unreleased features)
- [ ] Formatting is consistent with surrounding docs (Markdown headers, table style)
